creator: mfechner@FreeBSD.org
text:
It could be maybe a bug in gitlab itself.
I checked all logfiles from all installations I have and have not found such an error.
I committed a new bug fix release to version 11.6.5.
Could you please try if this helps?

If not, you have to report this problem to gitlab itself as it seems then to be a problem with gitlab and not with the gitlab package in FreeBSD.
